1710090.name: Глубокое Отчаяние 2 Demo
1710090.description:
Deep Despair 2: Demo is a stripped-down preview of the full game. Below is a list of limitations and differences from the full version:
  • There is no dungeons, and only the surface is available for research
  • Missing in-game map and minimap
  • There is no water transport
  • There are no boss battles
  • Some game mechanics have been cut
  • Removed the generation of cultures around the world
  • Removed the cycle of day and night, only daytime is available
  • Limited character development and crafting
  • Only the smallest world is available for creation
